subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of Bahá! The esteemed 'Abdu'l-Husayn Khán and the honored 'Alí-Muhammad Khán, two saplings of the Abhá Paradise, did spend some time in these regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء جناب عبدالحسین خان و جناب علیمحمد خان دو نهال جنت ابهی مدتی در اینصفحات
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
